item.title: Kubernetes JSONPath
item.author: Author
item.description: What is JSONPath? JSONPath JSONPath is for selecting data of the JSON. JSONPath You can test JSONPath Online Evaluator JSONPath Expressions JSONPath Description $ The root object/element @ The current object/element . or [] Child operator .. Recursive descent. * Wildcard. All objects/elements regardless their names. [] Subscript operator. XPath uses it to iterate over element collections and for predicates.
